adj_po.margin_is_first.claim: full-run playoff-SRS-adjusted margin ranks first all-time

away.wr_elite.claim: away win rate is at or above 95th pct among champions

bt.rank_is_first.claim: Bradley-Terry (wins-only) ranks the Knicks #1 all-time among champions

field.knicks_rose_most.claim: the Knicks elevated most from reg-season to playoffs of any 2026 playoff team

gap.east_not_historically_weak.claim: the East was not historically weak (West dominance below 80th percentile)

gap.west_more_dominant_most_seasons.claim: the West was more dominant in the majority of prior seasons

health.opponents_nearly_full.claim: all opponents were essentially fully healthy (avg health ≥ 95%)

health.spurs_fully_healthy.claim: the Spurs were fully healthy in the Finals

opp.schedule_near_median.claim: games-weighted opponent SRS sits near the historical median (35th-65th pct)

overperf.is_second_not_first.claim: playoff overperformance is 2nd all-time (97th+ pct, not 1st)

raw.margin_is_best.claim: raw avg margin is the highest ever recorded (100th percentile)

winprob.title_underdog.claim: model made Knicks underdogs in the Finals (<50% to win series)
